schema_preview: CREATE TABLE alias_conflict_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, symbol TEXT, name TEXT, chain TEXT, candidate_token_address TEXT, candidate_pair_address TEXT, conflict_type TEXT, resolution_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE api_budget_spend_ledger ( budget_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, provider TEXT NOT NULL, endpoint_type TEXT NOT NULL, mode TEXT NOT NULL, planned_calls INTEGER DEFAULT 0, actual_calls INTEGER DEFAULT 0, estimated_cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0, daily_call_limit INTEGER DEFAULT 0, monthly_cost_limit_usd REAL DEFAULT 0, allowed_before_call INTEGER DEFAULT 0, blocked_reason TEXT, approval_marker TEXT )

CREATE TABLE asymmetric_route_guard_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, guard_name TEXT NOT NULL, guard_status TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE asymmetric_speculative_route_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, policy_name TEXT NOT NULL, locked INTEGER NOT NULL, paper_live_allowed_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, meaning TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "asymmetric_watch_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, asymmetry_score REAL, upside_bucket TEXT, downside_risk_bucket TEXT, watch_reason TEXT, permission_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE autopsy_evidence_events ( evidence_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, autopsy_uid TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_type TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_status TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_value_json TEXT NOT NULL, source TEXT NOT NULL, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "birth_anchor_events" (anchor_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, anchor_type TEXT, anchor_time_utc TEXT, anchor_confidence TEXT, anchor_source TEXT, block_reason TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "birth_checkpoint_snapshots" (checkpoint_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, anchor_type TEXT, anchor_confidence TEXT, checkpoint_label TEXT, minute_from_anchor INTEGER, observed_at_utc TEXT, price_usd REAL, price_change_from_anchor_pct REAL, liquidity_usd REAL, liquidity_change_from_anchor_pct REAL, volume_window_usd REAL, tx_window_count INTEGER, buy_window_count INTEGER, sell_window_count INTEGER, max_gain_from_anchor_pct REAL, max_drawdown_from_ancho

CREATE TABLE "birth_missing_window_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, window_label TEXT, missing_reason TEXT, required INTEGER, impact_on_score REAL, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "birth_momentum_acceleration_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, window_label TEXT, volume_acceleration REAL, tx_acceleration REAL, acceleration_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "birth_momentum_warning_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, window_label TEXT, warning_type TEXT, warning_level TEXT, warning_reason TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "birth_money_flow_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, window_label TEXT, volume_usd REAL, estimated_inflow_usd REAL, estimated_outflow_usd REAL, net_flow_estimate_usd REAL, flow_confidence REAL, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "birth_timeline_quality_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, timeline_quality_status TEXT, missing_window_count INTEGER, source_conflict_count INTEGER, quality_score REAL, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE buyer_seller_balance_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, buy_count INTEGER, sell_count INTEGER, buy_sell_ratio REAL, sell_pressure_status TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE cascading_execution_filter_eval_events_v1 ( eval_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, route_type TEXT NOT NULL, current_stage_no INTEGER NOT NULL, current_stage_id TEXT NOT NULL, stage_result TEXT NOT NULL, stop_reason TEXT, rpc_calls_used INTEGER NOT NULL, eth_call_used INTEGER NOT NULL, router_quote_used INTEGER NOT NULL, execution_permission TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE center_signal_events_v1 ( signal_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, center_key TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, signal_type TEXT NOT NULL, score REAL, severity TEXT NOT NULL, freshness TEXT DEFAULT 'UNKNOWN', evidence_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

CREATE TABLE command_decision_events_v1 ( decision_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, fusion_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, decision_type TEXT NOT NULL, entry_size_hint REAL, sl_tp_plan_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', reason_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

CREATE TABLE confirmation_events ( confirmation_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, token_address TEXT, pair_address TEXT, source_a TEXT NOT NULL, source_b TEXT NOT NULL, source_a_observed_at_utc TEXT, source_b_observed_at_utc TEXT, price_delta_pct REAL, liquidity_delta_pct REAL, tx_delta_pct REAL, latency_a_ms REAL, latency_b_ms REAL, confirmation_status TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "control_dashboard_view_model_events_v1" ( view_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, generated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, panel_scope TEXT NOT NULL, view_model_json TEXT NOT NULL, source_counts_json TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "control_dashboard_view_model_events_v1__old_nullable_source_counts" ( view_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, generated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, panel_scope TEXT NOT NULL, view_model_json TEXT NOT NULL, source_counts_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
CREATE TABLE data_evidence_policy ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, scope TEXT NOT NULL, rule_text TEXT NOT NULL, severity TEXT NOT NULL, no_data_phrase TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE decision_binding_evaluation_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, final_quality_label TEXT NOT NULL, final_route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, primary_block_reason TEXT, winning_rule TEXT NOT NULL, permission_status TEXT NOT NULL, decision_conflict_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', input_summary_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE deployer_receipt_evidence_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, tx_hash TEXT, receipt_found INTEGER NOT NULL, token_log_match INTEGER NOT NULL, creation_proof INTEGER NOT NULL, zero_mint_unproven INTEGER NOT NULL, interpretation_label TEXT NOT NULL, source_object_uid TEXT, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "deployer_wallet_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, deployer_address TEXT, event_type TEXT, risk_status TEXT, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE dex_microstructure_technical_evidence_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, signal_name TEXT NOT NULL, signal_value TEXT, technical_status TEXT NOT NULL, technical_confidence TEXT NOT NULL, volume_quality TEXT NOT NULL, liquidity_support_status TEXT NOT NULL, wallet_diversity_status TEXT NOT NULL, manipulation_status TEXT NOT NULL, can_bypass_risk_gate INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',

CREATE TABLE "dynamic_position_size_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, size_status TEXT, suggested_size_usd REAL, max_size_usd REAL, size_reason TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE early_death_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, death_window_minutes INTEGER, first_alive_at_utc TEXT, death_detected_at_utc TEXT, death_reason TEXT, confidence REAL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE emergency_monitor_trigger_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, trigger_name TEXT NOT NULL, source_event_uid TEXT, priority_lane TEXT NOT NULL, action_required TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, recheck_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE entity_identity_events_v1 ( entity_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, raw_event_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, token_address TEXT, pair_address TEXT, symbol TEXT, name TEXT, identity_status TEXT NOT NULL, quality_flags_json TEXT DEFAULT '[]', evidence_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

CREATE TABLE event_outcome_labels_v1 ( label_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_uid TEXT NOT NULL, final_label TEXT NOT NULL, label_reason TEXT, labeled_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, usable_for_ai_training INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(event_uid) REFERENCES event_outcome_registry_v1(event_uid) )

CREATE TABLE event_outcome_observations_v1 ( observation_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_uid TEXT NOT NULL, observation_window TEXT NOT NULL, observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, price_change_pct REAL, volume_change_pct REAL, tx_change_pct REAL, liquidity_change_pct REAL, holder_change_pct REAL, gas_fee_usd REAL, slippage_cost_usd REAL, mev_cost_usd REAL, net_pnl_usd REAL, observation_note TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(event_uid) REFERENCES event_outcome_registry_v1(event_uid) )

CREATE TABLE event_outcome_registry_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_class TEXT NOT NULL, event_subclass TEXT, source_uid TEXT, source_type TEXT, asset_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, symbol TEXT, first_seen_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, event_time_utc TEXT, expected_direction TEXT, expected_impact_score REAL, relevance_score REAL, truth_score REAL, risk_score REAL, confidence_score REAL, fusion_score REAL, paper_trade_uid TEXT, mev_risk_score REAL, raw_ref_uid TEXT, created_a

CREATE TABLE evidence_event_ledger_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, source_phase TEXT NOT NULL, chain TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, event_family TEXT NOT NULL, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, event_status TEXT NOT NULL, confidence TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_hash TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE evidence_object_store_v1 ( object_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, object_kind TEXT NOT NULL, source_phase TEXT NOT NULL, chain TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, object_hash TEXT NOT NULL, object_summary_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE execution_preflight_audit_events_v1 ( preflight_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, route_type TEXT NOT NULL, paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL, live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL, failed_required_fields_json TEXT NOT NULL, passed_gate_list_json TEXT NOT NULL, blocked_reason_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE execution_rpc_budget_guard_events_v1 ( budget_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, guard_id TEXT NOT NULL, guard_result TEXT NOT NULL, blocked_expensive_call INTEGER NOT NULL, saved_call_type TEXT, reason_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE execution_safety_gate_events_v1 ( safety_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, route_type TEXT NOT NULL, minimum_pool_liquidity_usd REAL, buy_price_impact_pct REAL, sell_price_impact_pct REAL, expected_slippage_pct REAL, max_position_size_usd REAL, exit_liquidity_usd REAL, sell_route_status TEXT NOT NULL, tax_buy_pct REAL, tax_sell_pct REAL, mev_status TEXT NOT NULL, gas_cost_sanity TEXT NOT NULL, protected_route_status TEXT NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE execution_safety_gate_events_v2 ( safety_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, route_type TEXT NOT NULL, policy_uid TEXT, hard_block INTEGER NOT NULL, sell_route_status TEXT NOT NULL, minimum_pool_liquidity_usd REAL, exit_liquidity_usd REAL, buy_price_impact_pct REAL, sell_price_impact_pct REAL, expected_slippage_pct REAL, max_position_size_usd REAL, tax_buy_pct REAL, tax_sell_pct REAL, mev_status TEXT NOT NULL, s

CREATE TABLE execution_threshold_evaluation_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, field_name TEXT NOT NULL, field_value TEXT, threshold_status TEXT NOT NULL, decision_effect TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )
CREATE TABLE "false_positive_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, score_total REAL, failure_reason TEXT, failed_component TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE fast_decay_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, liquidity_drop_pct REAL, volume_drop_pct REAL, tx_drop_pct REAL, price_drop_pct REAL, decay_score REAL, observed_window_minutes INTEGER, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE fusion_score_events_v1 ( fusion_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, score_json TEXT NOT NULL, final_score REAL, route TEXT NOT NULL, hard_blocks_json TEXT DEFAULT '[]', soft_warnings_json TEXT DEFAULT '[]', created_at_utc TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
CREATE TABLE "gas_anomaly_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, chain TEXT, gas_cost_usd REAL, gas_anomaly_status TEXT, risk_reason TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "high_risk_tiny_route_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, risk_reason TEXT, death_life_crosscheck TEXT, sellability_required INTEGER, mev_required INTEGER, route_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "holder_distribution_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, holder_delta_pct REAL, distribution_status TEXT, risk_reason TEXT, snapshot_uid TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE holder_distribution_time_series_v1 ( holder_series_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, holder_count INTEGER, top1_pct REAL, top5_pct REAL, top10_pct REAL, new_holder_count INTEGER, exiting_holder_count INTEGER, distribution_quality TEXT NOT NULL, source_event_uid TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE holder_growth_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, holder_count INTEGER, holder_delta_pct REAL, holder_growth_status TEXT, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "holder_snapshots" (snapshot_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, holder_count INTEGER, top_10_holder_pct REAL, top_holder_pct REAL, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE initial_holder_evidence_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, holder_group_key TEXT, scan_window_json TEXT NOT NULL, transfer_mint_summary_json TEXT NOT NULL, risk_interpretation TEXT NOT NULL, source_object_uid TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE life_signal_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, life_status TEXT NOT NULL, life_signal_type TEXT, confidence REAL, evidence_summary TEXT, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE liquidity_alive_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, liquidity_usd REAL, liquidity_change_pct REAL, liquidity_status TEXT, snapshot_uid TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE liquidity_birth_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, liquidity_usd REAL, liquidity_birth_time_utc TEXT, source_tag TEXT, source_confidence REAL, snapshot_uid TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE liquidity_snapshots ( snapshot_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY CHECK (length(trim(snapshot_uid)) > 0), token_uid TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(token_uid)) > 0), pair_uid TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(pair_uid)) > 0), chain TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(chain)) > 0), pair_address TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(pair_address)) > 0), observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(observed_at_utc)) > 0), liquidity_usd REAL, liquidity_base REAL, liquidity_quote REAL, source TEXT NOT NUL

CREATE TABLE live_data_quality_events ( quality_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, fetch_uid TEXT, staging_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, severity TEXT NOT NULL, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, event_reason TEXT, field_name TEXT, old_value TEXT, new_value TEXT, expected_rule TEXT, snapshot_blocked INTEGER DEFAULT 1, manual_review_required INTEGER DEFAULT 1 )

CREATE TABLE live_fetch_ledger ( fetch_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, provider TEXT NOT NULL, endpoint_type TEXT NOT NULL, chain TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, token_address TEXT, pair_address TEXT, request_url_hash TEXT, api_budget_mode TEXT, max_calls_allowed INTEGER DEFAULT 0, call_index INTEGER DEFAULT 0, timeout_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0, retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, http_status INTEGER, api_call_made INTEGER DEFAULT 0, external_network_call_made INTEGER DEFAULT

CREATE TABLE "lp_wallet_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, lp_wallet_address TEXT, event_type TEXT, liquidity_usd REAL, risk_status TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE market_snapshots ( snapshot_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY CHECK (length(trim(snapshot_uid)) > 0), token_uid TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(token_uid)) > 0), pair_uid TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(pair_uid)) > 0), chain TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(chain)) > 0), pair_address TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(pair_address)) > 0), observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(observed_at_utc)) > 0), price_usd REAL, tx1h REAL, volume_1h_usd REAL, price_change_1h_pct REAL, buy_count_1h

CREATE TABLE "mev_outcome_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, route_profile_uid TEXT, outcome_label TEXT, realized_slippage_pct REAL, sandwich_detected INTEGER, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "mev_permission_gate_events" (decision_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, mev_permission_status TEXT, paper_permission INTEGER, live_permission INTEGER, hard_blocks_json TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)
CREATE TABLE "mev_risk_guard_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, mev_risk TEXT, sandwich_risk TEXT, gas_risk TEXT, route_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)
CREATE TABLE "mev_route_profiles" (profile_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, chain TEXT, route_type TEXT, route_provider TEXT, mev_protection_status TEXT, base_confidence REAL, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE mev_sandwich_risk_events ( mev_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, risk_type TEXT NOT NULL, risk_level TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_json TEXT NOT NULL, missing_data_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE mev_sandwich_risk_events_v1 ( mev_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, mev_level TEXT NOT NULL, sandwich_exposure INTEGER DEFAULT 0, swap_impact_pct REAL, slippage_required_pct REAL, tx_burst_score REAL, buy_sell_imbalance REAL, entry_gate TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

CREATE TABLE micro_route_size_plan_events_v1 ( size_plan_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, route_type TEXT NOT NULL, requested_size_usd REAL, max_safe_size_usd REAL, size_decision TEXT NOT NULL, linked_safety_event_uid TEXT, reason_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "min_received_guard_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, quote_amount_usd REAL, min_received_value REAL, slippage_cap_pct REAL, quote_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)
CREATE TABLE "missed_opportunity_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, score_total REAL, max_gain_multiple REAL, missed_reason TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE model_feedback_candidate_events_v1 ( feedback_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, candidate_source TEXT NOT NULL, linked_replay_case_uid TEXT, linked_lesson_uid TEXT, candidate_label TEXT NOT NULL, candidate_quality TEXT NOT NULL, approved_for_training INTEGER NOT NULL, approval_required INTEGER NOT NULL, evidence_hash TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "moonshot_memory_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, moonshot_status TEXT, evidence_summary TEXT, confidence REAL, risk_level TEXT, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "moonshot_narrative_bridge_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, narrative_event_uid TEXT, moonshot_bridge_status TEXT, support_score_delta REAL, hard_block_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "moonshot_outcome_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, outcome_label TEXT, max_gain_multiple REAL, max_drawdown_pct REAL, time_to_outcome_minutes INTEGER, label_confidence REAL, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "moonshot_source_pressure_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, source_gate_decision_uid TEXT, pair_verification_event_uid TEXT, source_pressure_status TEXT, conflict_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "moonshot_wallet_bridge_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, wallet_event_uid TEXT, moonshot_bridge_status TEXT, support_score_delta REAL, hard_block_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE morgue_route_decisions ( decision_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, route_decision TEXT NOT NULL, route_reason TEXT, death_status TEXT, trade_excluded INTEGER DEFAULT 1, paper_excluded INTEGER DEFAULT 1, live_excluded INTEGER DEFAULT 1, requires_autopsy INTEGER DEFAULT 1, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "narrative_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, narrative_type TEXT, headline_or_summary TEXT, source_uid TEXT, source_confidence REAL, event_time_utc TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, evidence_hash TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "narrative_outcome_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, narrative_event_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, outcome_label TEXT, max_gain_multiple REAL, max_drawdown_pct REAL, time_to_outcome_minutes INTEGER, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE narrative_signal_events_v2 (signal_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, narrative_type TEXT NOT NULL, signal_strength REAL NOT NULL CHECK(signal_strength >= 0 AND signal_strength <= 100), source_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK(source_count >= 0), created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(token_uid) REFERENCES tokens(token_uid), FOREIGN KEY(pair_uid) REFERENCES pairs(pair_uid))

CREATE TABLE "narrative_token_match_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, narrative_event_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, match_method TEXT, match_confidence REAL, alias_conflict_status TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE negative_memory_guard_events_v1 ( negative_guard_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, negative_label TEXT NOT NULL, preserve_reason TEXT NOT NULL, deletion_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL, archive_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL, training_value_label TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE negative_memory_lookup_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, memory_key TEXT NOT NULL, memory_value_hash TEXT NOT NULL, match_status TEXT NOT NULL, match_severity TEXT NOT NULL, source_ref TEXT, decision_effect TEXT NOT NULL, route_effect TEXT NOT NULL, confirmed_status TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE news_impact_events_v1 ( news_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, source_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, match_confidence TEXT NOT NULL, impact_label TEXT NOT NULL, impact_score REAL, narrative_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE news_raw_feed_events (news_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, source_uid TEXT NOT NULL, published_at_utc TEXT, title TEXT NOT NULL, url_hash TEXT, raw_hash TEXT, fetched_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(source_uid) REFERENCES news_source_registry(source_uid))

CREATE TABLE news_score_component_events_v1 ( component_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, score_uid TEXT NOT NULL, news_uid TEXT NOT NULL, component_name TEXT NOT NULL, component_score_100 REAL NOT NULL, component_weight REAL NOT NULL, evidence_text TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE news_score_events_v1 ( score_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, news_uid TEXT NOT NULL, source_uid TEXT, title_hash TEXT, scored_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, scoring_version TEXT NOT NULL, news_type TEXT NOT NULL, news_importance_score_100 REAL NOT NULL, news_reliability_score_100 REAL NOT NULL, news_token_relevance_score_100 REAL NOT NULL, news_risk_score_100 REAL NOT NULL, news_fusion_score_100 REAL NOT NULL, importance_label TEXT NOT NULL, reliability_label TEXT NOT NULL, token_connection_label TEXT

CREATE TABLE news_signal_events ( news_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, project_name TEXT, source_name TEXT NOT NULL, source_tier TEXT NOT NULL, news_type TEXT NOT NULL, official_status TEXT NOT NULL, matched_token_confidence TEXT NOT NULL, narrative_tags_json TEXT NOT NULL, evidence_url_or_ref TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE news_source_budget_ledger_v1 ( budget_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, source_uid TEXT NOT NULL, budget_date_utc TEXT NOT NULL, planned_call_budget INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, used_call_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, blocked_call_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_call_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, source_phase TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(source_uid) REFERENCES news_source_registry_v1(source_uid) ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE "news_source_reliability_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, source_uid TEXT, source_name TEXT, event_type TEXT, confidence_delta REAL, reason TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE news_token_match_events (match_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, news_uid TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, match_type TEXT NOT NULL, match_confidence TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(match_confidence IN ('CONFIRMED','LIKELY','UNVERIFIED')), evidence_text TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(news_uid) REFERENCES news_raw_feed_events(news_uid), FOREIGN KEY(token_uid) REFERENCES tokens(token_uid), FOREIGN KEY(pair_uid) REFERENCES pairs(pair_uid))

CREATE TABLE news_translation_quality_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, cache_uid TEXT NOT NULL, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, old_value TEXT, new_value TEXT, reason TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE no_pair_memory ( memory_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, chain TEXT NOT NULL, token_address TEXT, query_key TEXT, source_tag TEXT NOT NULL, failure_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, last_failure_reason TEXT, first_seen_utc TEXT, last_seen_utc TEXT )

CREATE TABLE opening_baseline_events ( baseline_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, pair_birth_event_uid TEXT, liquidity_birth_event_uid TEXT, opening_price_event_uid TEXT, baseline_status TEXT NOT NULL, baseline_confidence REAL, block_reason TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE pair_birth_events ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, token_address TEXT, pair_address TEXT, pair_birth_time_utc TEXT, source_tag TEXT, source_confidence REAL, evidence_hash TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE pairs ( pair_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY CHECK (length(trim(pair_uid)) > 0), token_uid TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(token_uid)) > 0), chain TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(chain)) > 0), pair_address TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(pair_address)) > 0), dex_name TEXT, base_token_address TEXT, quote_token_address TEXT, first_seen_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(first_seen_at_utc)) > 0), source TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(trim(source)) > 0), pair_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PIL

CREATE TABLE paper_observation_time_series_v1 ( observation_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, paper_decision_uid TEXT, window_label TEXT NOT NULL, price_change_pct REAL, max_runup_pct REAL, max_drawdown_pct REAL, liquidity_change_pct REAL, observation_quality TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "wallet_outcome_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, wallet_event_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, outcome_label TEXT, max_gain_multiple REAL, max_drawdown_pct REAL, time_to_outcome_minutes INTEGER, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE "wallet_risk_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, wallet_address TEXT, risk_type TEXT, risk_level TEXT, evidence_summary TEXT, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE wallet_tier_events (tier_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, wallet_uid TEXT NOT NULL, tier_code TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(tier_code IN ( 'BTC_BALANCE_LT_10_TRACK_ONLY', 'BTC_BALANCE_10_49_SMALL_WHALE', 'BTC_BALANCE_50_99_MID_WHALE', 'BTC_BALANCE_100_499_LARGE_WHALE', 'BTC_BALANCE_500_999_MEGA_WHALE', 'BTC_BALANCE_1000_PLUS_INSTITUTIONAL_WHALE' )), tier_label_tr TEXT NOT NULL, balance_btc REAL NOT NULL, alert_weight INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(alert_weight BETWEEN 1 AND 6), created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOR

CREATE TABLE wallet_token_entry_events (entry_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, wallet_uid TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, entry_amount_usd REAL, entry_price REAL, event_time_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(wallet_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_registry(wallet_uid), FOREIGN KEY(token_uid) REFERENCES tokens(token_uid), FOREIGN KEY(pair_uid) REFERENCES pairs(pair_uid))

CREATE TABLE wallet_transfer_events (transfer_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, chain TEXT NOT NULL, from_wallet_uid TEXT, to_wallet_uid TEXT, asset_symbol TEXT NOT NULL, amount REAL, amount_usd REAL, tx_hash TEXT, block_time_utc TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(from_wallet_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_registry(wallet_uid), FOREIGN KEY(to_wallet_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_registry(wallet_uid))

CREATE TABLE whale_flow_events_v1 ( whale_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL, chain TEXT, token_uid TEXT, wallet_cluster_uid TEXT, flow_direction TEXT NOT NULL, flow_value_usd REAL, confidence TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

CREATE TABLE "whale_movement_events" (event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, wallet_address TEXT, movement_type TEXT, amount_usd REAL, side TEXT, source_tag TEXT, observed_at_utc TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT)

CREATE TABLE whale_wallet_events ( wallet_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL, wallet_label TEXT, chain TEXT NOT NULL, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, token_address TEXT, pair_address TEXT, amount_usd_est REAL, tx_hash TEXT, counterparty_address TEXT, evidence_json TEXT NOT NULL, observed_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL )

description: All historical evidence must not be moved in one transaction.
Block range cap is a guard, not the only cap.
Raw row/event cap is mandatory even if block range is small.
Token batch cap prevents wide seed bursts.
Pair cap prevents one token with many pools from flooding seed.
Transaction row cap protects SQLite while WAL remains off.

meaning: Excluded from default decision view and active route processing; evidence is not deleted.
Evict from active processing queue only; keep audit/evidence history.

base_rule: conflicting pools are aggregated with worst-case bias

description: Low-value/noise pools excluded from normal decision view still remain emergency watched.

target: prove mapping with limited token/pair/block chunks before any real seed
plan real seed with backup/rollback only after temp dry-run passes
only after exact explicit approval; still no panel/paper/live/runtime
